source_pr.title: log: Support a dedicated log file to save general log
source_pr.body: ### What problem does this PR solve? Issue Number: ref #51248 Problem Summary: ### What changed and how does it work? ### Check List Tests - [x] Unit test - [ ] Integration test - [x] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below) Test normal log with dashboard ![image](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/assets/17435596/c1b95c22-c898-4771-a5b1-306edd35f96b) ![image](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/assets/17435596/62d0effe-c6fe-49ef-aa96-e8f15cc5267a) Test slow query with dashboard, could found the first slow query in compressed file. - [ ] No need to test > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed. > Side effects - [x] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU ``` When compression is enabled, it slows down log searches in the dashboard and also affects queries performance to the `cluster_slow_query` table. ``` - [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory - [ ] Breaking backward compatibility Documentation - [ ] Affects user behaviors - [ ] Contains syntax changes - [ ] Contains variable changes - [ ] Contains experimental features - [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility ### Release note Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note. ```release-note None ```

symptoms: sql: "select time from cluster_slow_query where time > '2020-02-17 12:00:05.000000' and time < '2020-05-14 20:00:00.000000' order by time desc", (pkg/executor/cluster_table_test.go)
failure_signature: sql: "select time from cluster_slow_query where time > '2020-02-17 12:00:05.000000' and time < '2020-05-14 20:00:00.000000' order by time desc", (pkg/executor/cluster_table_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: sql: "select time from cluster_slow_query where time > '2020-02-17 12:00:05.000000' and time < '2020-05-14 20:00:00.000000' order by time desc", (pkg/executor/cluster_table_test.go)
